title: forge-sdlc adapter manifest
description: Schema for an adapter manifest. Each adapter under adapters/<name>/ has an adapter.json that conforms to this.

name.description: Lowercase, kebab-case. Must match the directory name under adapters/.

version.description: Semver. Bump on any tool/stage/routing change.

description.description: What this adapter integrates with. One sentence, no marketing.

items.description: Key under mcpServers in this adapter's mcp.json. Multiple servers allowed for composite adapters.

mcpServers.description: Keys of MCP server entries in this adapter's mcp.json.

name.description: MCP tool name as exposed by the server.

stages.description: Stages allowed to call this tool. '*' = any stage. The orchestrator never calls adapter tools directly — it spawns sub-agents that do.

readOnly.description: If true, the tool only reads state. Validator can call read-only tools even if not in its stages list.

idempotent.description: If true, the tool is safe to retry (e.g. status transitions, label adds). Hook layer may auto-retry on transient failures.

required.description: If true, the install script refuses to enable the adapter unless this env var is set.

secret.description: If true, the install script verifies the value comes from ${env:...} indirection, not inline.

description.description: Where to get this credential. e.g. 'Atlassian account settings → API tokens'.

items.description: Path to a steering file. Loaded on-demand into sub-agents that use this adapter.

stage.description: Per-stage overrides. Use to inject stage-specific notes that aren't in the main usage.md.

systemPromptAdditions.description: Path to a markdown file appended to the stage agent's system prompt when this adapter is enabled.
